command.description: Provide a resource with a new URI
command.name: Rename Resource

command.description: Adds an additional import statement to the ontology
command.name: Add Import...

command.description: Opens the resource editor for selected resource
command.name: Edit Selected Resource

commonFilter.description: Hide the resource which are already shown underneath the Models folder
commonFilter.name: Models resources
